Episodes.Title: Scratching the Surface
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alex Bystram
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Henry Chan, Ho Chow
Episodes.Plot: 25 May 2002: China Airlines Flight 611, a Boeing 747, broke up in mid-air and crashed into the sea of Formosa Strait, just 20 minutes after taking off from Taipei.

Episodes.Title: Lockerbie Disaster
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Larry Bambrick
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Thomas Mitchell, Richard Nash
Episodes.Plot: A depiction of the destruction of Pan Am 103 over Lockerbie, Scotland and the intense investigation that followed.

Episodes.Title: Sight Unseen
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Ash Knight, Saad Siddiqui
Episodes.Plot: One of the most horrifying mid-air collisions in history happened over India in 1996. Finding the chain of mishaps and unfortunate events is not easy for the investigators.

Episodes.Title: Operation Babylift
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Larry Bambrick
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Jimmy Byron, Peter Pasyk
Episodes.Plot: An American C-5 Galaxy is flying orphaned Vietnamese babies out of Saigon into safety when things go horribly wrong at 23,000 feet. The investigation uncovers some shady practices and also the heroism of the crew trying to save ev...

Episodes.Title: Falling Fast
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Mike Sheehan
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Jeff Seymour, Asim Wali
Episodes.Plot: The aircraft, TS-LBB, took off from Bari, Italy, as Flight 1153 at 2:32 p.m. local time, on its return leg to Djerba, Tunisia. At about 3:15 p.m., the pilot alerted the Palermo Punta Raisi airport to technical problems and request...

Episodes.Title: Flight 574: Lost
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Jeff Sturge
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Jason Weinberg, Gerry Mendicino
Episodes.Plot: When a Boeing 737 flies into a storm and crashes into the sea, the investigators cannot believe what actually brought down this very sophisticated aircraft.

Episodes.Title: Frozen in Flight
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Gransden
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Kieran Gallant, George Tchortov
Episodes.Plot: Depicts the crash of American Eagle Flight 4184 near Roselawn, IN, an ATR-72 that got caught in icing conditions, and the subsequent investigation.
